title: Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions:
Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions!
